creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
1. This is a dupe of ports/174563 (didn't see that PR before I filed
this issue).
2. There needs to be an override because the one implemented here has
issues with the directory as well (the patch attached to ports/174563
is a wee bit smarter, but still we need an override).
I'll try and see if I can figure out an equivalent flag in OptionsNG
or catch bapt@ on IRC about this item.
Thanks!
-Garrett
